description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a boxy silhouette. The upholstery is a smooth, solid light gray fabric that covers both the seat and backrest cushions, which are divided into two equal sections. The armrests are straight, flat, and extend to the same height as the backrest, creating a uniform rectangular profile. The sofa sits on four slender, black metal legs positioned at each corner, providing a slight elevation and a sense of lightness. The seat and back cushions appear to be firmly attached and uniformly padded, offering a structured and supportive seating experience. The overall aesthetic is contemporary and functional, suitable for urban outdoor or indoor public spaces.
description: A modern, light gray two-seater sofa with straight armrests, divided seat and back cushions, and slim black metal legs. Its clean, boxy design and smooth upholstery give it a contemporary urban look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sofa's two divided seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and overall rectangular shape.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the flat, straight armrest and the slim profile of the sofa, with visible black metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, unadorned backrest and the full width of the sofa, with the black base and legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the straight armrest and the sofa's slim, elevated stance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two seat cushions and two back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, arranged side by side in a symmetrical layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, straight black metal legs positioned at each corner, exposed and slightly elevating the sofa above the ground.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest divided into two equal sections, with attached cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
